title: Shiitake and Mushroom Skewers with Croatian Spice
description: A flavorful vegetarian dish featuring marinated shiitake and button mushrooms, grilled to perfection on skewers with a hint of Croatian spice. Perfect as a quick and easy dinner or lunch.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, Croatian spice blend, and a pinch of salt.
Add the shiitake and button mushrooms to the bowl, tossing to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated mushrooms onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the tops of the skewers with additional olive oil.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the mushrooms are tender and lightly charred.
Serve hot, garnished with crunchy onion and additional Croatian spice blend if desired.
